hero.eyebrow: Institute of STEM & Robotics · By Miraidon
hero.heading:
Build robots.
Write code.
Change the world.
hero.body: Hands-on robotics, coding and AI for kids aged 6–16, taught by competition coaches. Six tracks. In-person and online. Real projects every week.

whyUs.heading:
Competition pedigree.
Real projects every week.

reasons.heading: Small class sizes
reasons.body: Max 8 students per session. Every kid gets real hands-on time with the hardware — no waiting, no passengers.

reasons.heading: Competition pedigree
reasons.body: Our coaches have competed in and coached FIRST LEGO League for 4+ seasons. We know what winning looks like — and how to build toward it.

reasons.heading: Project-based learning
reasons.body: No rote instruction. Every session ends with something built, coded, or competed. Progress is visible and tangible every week.

items.title: AI for Kids — Parent Info Night

trialForm.heading: Book a free trial class
trialForm.body: No commitment. Your child attends one class for free — then decides if they want to keep building.
trialForm.successBody: We'll be in touch within 24 hours to confirm your free trial. Bring curiosity — we'll handle the rest.
trialForm.disclaimer: No payment required. We'll confirm by email within 24 hours.
